title: MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Responds to individuals experiencing a mental health crisis by providing a mental health assessment to facilitate connection to the most appropriate community resource. Phone support, co-response, and in-person response services are available. 2210 Eldorado Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Crisis line: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Walk-in crisis services: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Crisis Line (541) 883-1030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or walk in for crisis services FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Services: In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Crisis Lines Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO
